name: python-libsedml

metadata.name: python-libsedml
metadata.summary: Couldn't find suitable artifact for python-libsedml==2.0.32

documentation: libSEDML is a library for reading, writing and manipulating SEDML.  It is written in ISO C and C++, supports SEDML Levels 1, Version 1-3, and runs on Linux, Microsoft Windows, and Apple MacOS X.  For more information about SEDML, please see http://sed-ml.org/.
